company_overview: ImmiWing is an immigration & visa consulting firm, also styled as 'ImmiWing by Ahmed & Associates'. Their website is https://immiwing.com. They offer Skilled Immigration, Business Immigration, Investor Immigration, Student Visa Consulting, Direct Citizenship Programs, other visa services, and advisory services. Office based in Karachi, Pakistan.

services.skilled_immigration: Assists professionals in migrating based on skills and qualifications, including finding suitable countries, documentation, and application support.
services.business_immigration: Helps entrepreneurs/business owners immigrate abroad, including business setup, investment, documentation, and residency application.
services.direct_citizenship: Fast-track citizenship or second passport programs through government-approved or investment-based pathways.
services.investor_immigration: Residency/citizenship via investment programs abroad, including guidance on approved investment opportunities.
services.student: Study visa support including admission guidance, visa application, documentation, and interview preparation.
services.other_visas: Family visas, visit visas, work permits, and sponsorship programs.
services.consultation: Personalized consultation for eligibility assessment and recommending suitable immigration pathways.

caution: Website registered in 2025 with limited reviews.
Licensing or accreditation not publicly visible.
Verify all programs with official government authorities.
Consultants cannot guarantee visa approval or citizenship.
Always request written agreements, clear fee breakdowns, and references before proceeding.
